name: Hero Section
description: Full-width hero with headline, subtext, CTA buttons, and optional media. Entry point for landing pages, recipe detail headers, and marketing sections.

slots.headline: Primary heading, typically h1 with _heading1
slots.media: Optional image, illustration, or chart component

image-overlay.description: Full-bleed image with gradient overlay, content at bottom. Used for recipe/cookbook detail headers.

slots.image: Full-bleed background cover image with gradient overlay
slots.top-bar: Absolute top row: back button (left) + action buttons (right)
slots.tags: Optional horizontal Chip row for tags overlaid on image
slots.title: Title (_heading2) overlaid at bottom of image

image-overlay-compact.description: Compact full-bleed image with overlay for collection headers. Shorter height, fewer slots.

slots.image: Full-bleed background cover image with gradient overlay
slots.top-actions: Absolute top-right: edit and delete action Buttons
slots.content: Absolute bottom: title (_heading2), count Badge, author Avatar + name

slots.headline: Primary heading, typically h1 with _heading1
slots.media: Optional image, illustration, or chart component

command-center.notes: Headline uses cc-label. CTA buttons get cc-glow on primary action. Background uses cc-grid overlay.

preset_notes.image-overlay: Hero image framed with cc-frame border. Tags use cc-label. Title uses cc-data.
preset_notes.image-overlay-compact: Hero framed with cc-frame border. Title uses cc-data. Count badge uses cc-label.

auradecantism.notes: Hero section on d-mesh background. Headline uses d-gradient-text. CTA button gets aura-glow.

preset_notes.image-overlay: Gradient overlay uses d-mesh tones. Title uses d-gradient-text. Subtle aura-glow on action buttons.
preset_notes.image-overlay-compact: Gradient overlay blends into d-mesh tones. Title uses d-gradient-text.

clean.notes: Hero on subtle muted background. No gradients or glass. Standard button styling.

preset_notes.image-overlay: Simple image with dark gradient overlay for text legibility. No extra effects.
preset_notes.image-overlay-compact: Simple image with dark gradient overlay for text legibility.
